name: Message Linter
description: Suppresses automatic URL embeds in messages by wrapping Markdown link URLs in angle brackets.

zhtw.description: Convert Simplified Chinese to Traditional Chinese (via zhtw-mcp)

links.description: Wrap Markdown link URLs in angle brackets to suppress Discord embeds

headings.description: Normalize Markdown headings (shift down so minimum becomes H1, cap at H3)

kaomoji.description: Sanitize backticks around kaomoji to prevent accidental code formatting

blockquotes.description: Ensure blockquote lines have a space after > for Discord compatibility
